description: Style Note Designed for those who never compromise on comfort and style, this sandal from ganuchi is a great buy. Slip into it and pair it with jeans and casual T-shirts for unparalleled cool. Product Details Round toed black sandals with a velcro closure at the side in the midfoot region Leather upper which covers the forefoot and midfoot region, open at the toe with cut out in the midfoot region on the sides Soft footbed and padded inner Upper stitched to the outsole TPU outsole with deep grooves Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain the shine
